final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand (all in-image text in Japanese).

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents and purple flowers — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a hero section layout with left column (text content), center subject (model), right column (product display + stat cards), bottom section with benefit cards
Subject: must include young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum; must include moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and packaging box
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs soft lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant with purple floral accents
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), navigation links: "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ", CTA button "今すぐ試す", headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", feature badges "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える", bullet points "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア", CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >", trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破", benefit cards "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Japanese by default; must preserve exact Japanese text as specified; must include 5 navigation links, 3 feature badges (pill-shaped), 3 bullet points (pink checkmarks), 2 CTA buttons, 3 stat cards (floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents), 3 benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles)
Avoid:
